### last time {.smaller}

*  bootstrapping ROP chains
   *  example: overwriting function pointer
   *  looking for gadgets that set `%rsp` then return
   *  find way to control where value used to set %rsp comes from
   *  example: if `mov %rbx, %rsp`, figure out how to set `%rbx`
* chaining gadgets without RET
   *  gadgets ending with, for example, `jmp *%rdi`, `jmp *8(%rdx)`, `call *%rax`
   *  need to arrange for jmp/call destination to be set correctly
   *  look for "dispatcher gadget" like `add $8, %rcx; jmp *(%rcx)` 
      *  point `%rcx` at array of gadget addresses
      *  arrange for each such gadget to jump back to dispatcher

### assignment Q+A

### logistics note

<!-- FIXME: addtl UAF exercise? -->

{{< include /uaf/_talk-inner.qmd >}}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_talk-inner.qmd ?}}
